description_en: No telescope yet! Observe the Moon with your own eyes and learn how the eye forms an image.
description_zh: 还没有望远镜！先用肉眼观察月球，学习眼睛是如何成像的。
hint_text_en: Look for the brightest round object in the sky.
hint_text_zh: 寻找天空中最明亮的圆形目标。
success_text_en: Your eyes are your first astronomical instrument.
success_text_zh: 眼睛就是你的第一台天文仪器。

description_en: Find Polaris with your naked eye and learn what your eyes can and cannot see.
description_zh: 用肉眼找到北极星，了解肉眼能看见什么、看不见什么。
hint_text_en: Polaris sits toward the northern sky.
hint_text_zh: 北极星位于天空北侧。
success_text_en: Bright stars are easy - but faint objects need more light. Time to build a telescope!
success_text_zh: 亮星容易看见，但暗弱目标需要更多光。该组装望远镜了！

description_en: Assemble your first refractor: objective lens in front, eyepiece at the back. Then observe the Moon again.
description_zh: 组装第一台折射望远镜：前端物镜、后端目镜。然后再次观察月球。
hint_text_en: The Moon looks completely different through a telescope.
hint_text_zh: 通过望远镜看到的月球完全不同。
success_text_en: The objective collects light, the eyepiece magnifies the image.
success_text_zh: 物镜收集光线，目镜放大图像。

description_en: A telescope image is blurry until you focus it. Observe Jupiter and turn the focus knob until it is sharp.
description_zh: 望远镜的图像在对焦前是模糊的。观察木星，转动调焦旋钮直到清晰。
hint_text_en: After observing, adjust focus in the telescope view until the image is sharp.
hint_text_zh: 观测后，在望远镜视野里调焦直到图像清晰。
success_text_en: Focusing aligns the focal plane image with the eyepiece.
success_text_zh: 调焦让焦平面图像与目镜位置对齐。

description_en: Study Jupiter and learn why higher magnification narrows the view and dims the image.
description_zh: 观察木星，理解为什么更高倍率会让视野更窄、图像更暗。
hint_text_en: Compare how magnification changes brightness and field of view.
hint_text_zh: 比较倍率如何改变亮度和视野。
success_text_en: Choose magnification for the target, not just the biggest number.
success_text_zh: 按目标选择倍率，而不是盲目追求最大数字。

description_en: Install the finder scope and use its wide view to find Sirius before the main telescope takes over.
description_zh: 安装寻星镜，用它的宽视野先找到天狼星，再交给主望远镜。
hint_text_en: The finder scope widens your aiming view.
hint_text_zh: 寻星镜能加宽你的瞄准视野。
success_text_en: Wide view to find, narrow view to study.
success_text_zh: 宽视野找目标，窄视野看细节。

description_en: Learn how a Newtonian reflector uses mirrors instead of lenses, then hunt the Orion Nebula.
description_zh: 学习牛顿反射望远镜如何用镜子代替透镜，然后寻找猎户座大星云。
hint_text_en: Look for a faint purple cloud below Orion's Belt.
hint_text_zh: 在猎户座腰带下方寻找一片暗淡的紫色云雾。
success_text_en: Mirrors can gather light just like lenses - often with a bigger aperture.
success_text_zh: 镜子和透镜一样能收集光线，而且通常口径更大。

description_en: The Orion Nebula is faint. Upgrade to a larger aperture and see how much more appears.
description_zh: 猎户座大星云很暗。升级更大口径，看看能多看到多少。
hint_text_en: Dark objects need a larger aperture to collect enough light.
hint_text_zh: 暗弱天体需要更大的口径来收集足够的光。
success_text_en: Aperture is the single most important telescope number.
success_text_zh: 口径是望远镜最重要的参数。

description_en: Find the Andromeda Galaxy - the most distant object you can see. Stability and aperture matter most here.
description_zh: 寻找仙女座星系——你能看到的最遥远天体。这里最考验稳定性和口径。
hint_text_en: Look for a faint oval smudge of light far from the bright stars.
hint_text_zh: 在远离亮星的地方寻找一团暗淡的椭圆形光斑。
success_text_en: Faint galaxies need strong light gathering and a well-built telescope.
success_text_zh: 暗弱的星系需要强大的集光能力和高质量的组装。

title_zh: 重返木星——过犹不及的倍率
description_en: Jupiter is back. Try the Low, Medium, and High eyepieces one by one and see what higher magnification really costs.
description_zh: 木星又来了。依次试试低、中、高三档目镜，看看更高的倍率到底要付出什么代价。
hint_text_en: Switch eyepieces and compare: bigger is not always clearer.
hint_text_zh: 换着目镜比较：图像更大不代表更清楚。
success_text_en: Bigger is not clearer. You proved it yourself tonight.
success_text_zh: 更大不等于更清楚。今晚你亲手证明了。
repeat_target_reason_en: Same Jupiter, new question: how much power is too much?
repeat_target_reason_zh: 还是木星，但问题变了：多高的倍率算太高？

mission_steps.label_zh: 换 10mm 目镜再观测一次

description_en: Mars sits low tonight. High magnification only makes the shaky air worse - find the power that keeps the view steady.
description_zh: 今晚火星很低。高倍率只会让抖动的大气更明显——找到能保持画面稳定的倍率。
hint_text_en: If the image looks mushy, that's the low-altitude air, not your telescope.
hint_text_zh: 如果画面糊糊的，那是低空大气的问题，不是望远镜坏了。
success_text_en: Low targets swim in thick air. Less power, steadier view.
success_text_zh: 低空目标泡在厚厚的大气里。倍率低一点，画面稳一点。
repeat_target_reason_en: Mars again - but tonight it hugs the horizon.
repeat_target_reason_zh: 又是火星——但今晚它贴着地平线。

description_en: The Moon is bright enough to take high power. But every new eyepiece needs a fresh focus - re-focus after switching.
description_zh: 月亮够亮，能扛住高倍率。但每换一个目镜都要重新调焦——切换后请重新对焦。
hint_text_en: Push the power up, then re-focus - the Moon can handle it.
hint_text_zh: 把倍率推高，然后重新调焦——月亮扛得住。
success_text_en: Same rule, different target: brightness pays for power.
success_text_zh: 同一条规则，不同的目标：亮度为倍率买单。
repeat_target_reason_en: Back to the Moon - the one target that rewards high power.
repeat_target_reason_zh: 回到月亮——唯一奖励高倍率的目标。

description_en: Your call tonight. Pick a target and pick your own power - no hints this time.
description_zh: 今晚你说了算。自己选目标，自己选倍率——这次没有提示。
hint_text_en: Choose wisely: the right power depends on the target, not habit.
hint_text_zh: 选得巧一点：合适的倍率取决于目标，不是习惯。
success_text_en: You chose like an observer, not a beginner. Chapter logged.
success_text_zh: 你的选择像个观测者，而不是新手了。本章记入日志。

description_en: No guessing tonight. The target hint circle is off - read the azimuth and altitude numbers and navigate there yourself.
description_zh: 今晚不靠猜。目标提示圈关闭了——自己读方位角和俯仰角数字，靠数字找过去。
hint_text_en: Check the SELECTED panel for Mars's Az/Alt and steer by the numbers.
hint_text_zh: 查看 SELECTED 面板里火星的方位角/俯仰角，按数字转动。
success_text_en: Coordinates turned the whole sky into an address book.
success_text_zh: 坐标把整个天空变成了一本地址簿。
repeat_target_reason_en: Mars a third time - but tonight you navigate by numbers, not by luck.
repeat_target_reason_zh: 第三次找火星——但今晚靠数字导航，不靠运气。

description_en: A fresh finder scope lies a little. Line up the wide view and the narrow view until they agree, then find Sirius.
description_zh: 刚装上的寻星镜会撒点小谎。把宽视野和窄视野对齐一致，然后再去找天狼星。
hint_text_en: Center a bright star in the telescope view, then nudge until the finder agrees.
hint_text_zh: 先在望远镜视野里把亮星居中，再微调直到寻星镜也对准它。
success_text_en: Now your wide eye and your narrow eye agree.
success_text_zh: 现在你的宽眼睛和窄眼睛终于一致了。

description_en: Feeling confident? Try the main telescope alone first - then follow Eye to Finder to Scope like Maya taught you.
description_zh: 自信满满？先只用主望远镜试试——然后按 Maya 教的肉眼到寻星镜到主镜的顺序来。
hint_text_en: Lost in the 6-degree view? Go wide first, narrow last.
hint_text_zh: 在 6 度视野里迷路了？先宽后窄。
success_text_en: The narrow field shows detail. The wide field shows the way.
success_text_zh: 窄视野看细节，宽视野认路。

description_en: Tonight Maya stays by the door. No hint circle, a random bright target - navigate the whole workflow alone.
description_zh: 今晚 Maya 站在门口不带路。没有提示圈，目标随机——独立完成整套导航流程。
hint_text_en: Read the coordinates, go Eye to Finder to Scope, and identify the target on your own.
hint_text_zh: 读坐标，按肉眼到寻星镜到主镜的顺序走，独立完成识别。
success_text_en: You navigated alone. That's the real badge.
success_text_zh: 你独立完成了导航。这才是真正的徽章。

title_zh: 猎户座大星云——第一团淡斑
description_en: A nebula never gives you sharp edges. Tonight, a faint smudge through the eyepiece already counts as success.
description_zh: 星云永远不会给你清晰的边缘。今晚，目镜里一团淡淡的光斑就已经算成功。
hint_text_en: A faint, blurry glow below Orion's Belt is exactly what you're looking for.
hint_text_zh: 猎户座腰带下方那团模糊的暗光，就是你要找的目标。
success_text_en: You saw light that traveled 1,300 years. Blurry, and still beautiful.
success_text_zh: 你看到了跋涉 1300 年的光。虽然模糊，依然动人。
repeat_target_reason_en: Same nebula as L7 - but tonight we change what 'success' means.
repeat_target_reason_zh: 还是那片星云——但今晚我们改变'成功'的定义。

description_en: Same sky, same nebula. Only one thing changes tonight: how much light you collect. Upgrade the objective and look again.
description_zh: 同样的天空，同样的星云。今晚只改变一件事：你收集多少光。换上更大的物镜再看一次。
hint_text_en: Equip the larger objective before you observe - light gathering makes the difference.
hint_text_zh: 观测前先装上更大的物镜——集光能力决定了差别。
success_text_en: Last night a smudge, tonight a shape. That difference is aperture.
success_text_zh: 昨晚是一团斑，今晚有了形状。这个差别，就叫口径。
repeat_target_reason_en: Third visit to Orion - this time as a controlled experiment.
repeat_target_reason_zh: 第三次看猎户座星云——这次是一场对照实验。

description_en: Andromeda is huge - and the city lights are eating it alive. No matter how you adjust, tonight's sky sets the ceiling.
description_zh: 仙女座星系很大——但城市的灯光正在活活吞掉它。无论怎么调整，今晚的天空条件就是上限。
hint_text_en: The glow won't get much sharper tonight - the sky itself is the problem, not your gear.
hint_text_zh: 今晚这团光斑不会变得更清晰——问题出在天空本身，不是你的设备。
success_text_en: Nothing was broken tonight. The sky itself was the problem. Log it honestly.
success_text_zh: 今晚没有任何设备坏掉。问题出在天空本身。如实记录下来。
repeat_target_reason_en: Andromeda again - but the enemy tonight is streetlights, not distance.
repeat_target_reason_zh: 又是仙女座——但今晚的敌人是路灯，不是距离。

description_en: The club drove out past the hills tonight. Same gear, darker sky. Try Andromeda again and see the difference.
description_zh: 今晚俱乐部开车到了山那边。设备没变，天更暗了。再试一次仙女座，看看差别。
hint_text_en: Same telescope as before - let the darker sky do the work this time.
hint_text_zh: 望远镜和上次一样——这次让更暗的天空帮你的忙。
success_text_en: Your telescope didn't improve overnight - your sky did.
success_text_zh: 你的望远镜一夜之间没有变好——变好的是你的天空。

description_en: Watch closely. The star is running away - no, the Earth is turning under you. Keep it centered as it drifts.
description_zh: 盯紧了。星星在慢慢逃——不，是地球在你脚下转。在它漂移时持续把它保持居中。
hint_text_en: The target drifts slowly in azimuth. Keep nudging it back to center.
hint_text_zh: 目标会沿方位角缓慢漂移，持续微调把它拉回中心。
success_text_en: You just fought the planet's spin by hand. Feel the workout?
success_text_zh: 你刚才在徒手对抗地球自转。感觉到工作量了吧？

description_en: Tired arms? This mount turns at exactly the speed of the sky. Install it and dial the tracking rate to match the drift.
description_zh: 手酸了吧？这个支架会以和天空完全相同的速度转动。装上它，把追踪速率调到匹配漂移。
hint_text_en: Dial the tracking rate close to 1x so the mount cancels the drift for you.
hint_text_zh: 把追踪速率调到接近 1 倍，让支架替你抵消漂移。
success_text_en: Now the machine fights the spin, and you just watch.
success_text_zh: 现在由机器对抗自转，你只管看。
repeat_target_reason_en: Jupiter, fourth time - but tonight you don't touch the keys.
repeat_target_reason_zh: 第四次看木星——但今晚你的手可以离开按键。

description_en: One last lesson: deep sky rewards the patient. Hold Andromeda steady for a long, continuous look.
description_zh: 最后一课：深空回报有耐心的人。让仙女座保持稳定，进行一次长时间的持续观测。
hint_text_en: Best gear, steady hold: keep Andromeda centered until the progress bar fills.
hint_text_zh: 用上最好的设备，稳住不动：让仙女座保持居中直到进度条充满。
success_text_en: From naked eyes to a tracked deep-sky watch - you finished the whole path. Senior Observer.
success_text_zh: 从肉眼到追踪深空——整条路你走完了。高级观测员。
